User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the platform, who can be a candidate, a company representative, or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, typically from Firebase Auth.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user on the platform.

companyId.description: The ID of the company the user belongs to (if role is 'company').

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company that posts tasks and hires candidates.

description.description: A brief description of the company.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns/created the company.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a skill-based task created by a company.

description.description: A detailed description of the task requirements.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the task.

deadline.description: The submission deadline for the task.

companyId.description: The ID of the company that created the task.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a candidate's submission for a specific task.

taskId.description: The ID of the task being submitted for.

userId.description: The ID of the candidate who made the submission.

companyId.description: The ID of the company that owns the task (denormalized).

value.description: The URL to the submission content (e.g., GitHub repo, Figma file) or a path to a stored file.

status.description: The current status of the submission.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the submission was made.

Evaluation.title: Evaluation
Evaluation.description: Represents a company's evaluation of a candidate's submission.

submissionId.description: The ID of the submission being evaluated.

score.description: The score (0-100) given to the submission.

feedback.description: Constructive feedback provided by the evaluator.

evaluatedBy.description: The ID of the company user who performed the evaluation.

evaluatedAt.description: The timestamp when the evaluation was completed.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles for all roles.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores all tasks created by companies.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Stores all candidate submissions for tasks.

/evaluations/{evaluationId}.description: Stores evaluation feedback and scores for submissions.
